title: AE GPT | Free Resource | Creators Toolbox
text:

AE GPT
AI assistant for After Effects — generate expressions, scripts, and automate tasks with natural language prompts.
About AE GPT
AE GPT is a free creative resource on Creators Toolbox for designers and creators.
Try AE GPT
Creators Toolbox — Free Design Tools, Games & Resources for Creators
Creators Toolbox is a free, browser-based platform with 100+ design tools, creative resources, interactive games, and curated courses for graphic designers, web designers, video editors, and content creators. Every tool runs in the browser — no downloads, no sign-ups.
Design Tools
Generate noise textures, CSS gradients, halftone patterns, flow fields, duotone images, SVG blobs, mesh gradients, glassmorphism effects, color palettes, and more. Each tool exports production-ready assets in PNG, SVG, or CSS.
Creative Resources
Browse curated collections of free fonts, icon libraries, stock photography, texture packs, animation libraries, UI kits, illustration sets, and inspiration platforms — hand-picked for designers and developers.
Games & Quizzes
Sharpen your design skills with interactive challenges: match hex colors by eye, identify typefaces, test your knowledge of design history, and compete on leaderboards.
Courses
Learn motion design, typography, and visual fundamentals through structured, hands-on lessons built directly into the platform.
Who Is Creators Toolbox For?
Creators Toolbox serves graphic designers building brand assets, web designers prototyping layouts, video editors creating thumbnails, social-media managers generating content, and students learning design fundamentals. Whether you need a quick gradient for a hero section or a full noise-texture pack for a client project, every tool is free and instantly accessible.
Frequently Asked Questions
Is Creators Toolbox free?
Yes. All tools, games, quizzes, and most resources are completely free to use with no account required.
Do I need to install anything?
No. Every tool runs in the browser. There is nothing to download or install.
What file formats can I export?
Most tools export PNG, SVG, or CSS code. Some tools also support JPEG and WebP export.
Can I use the assets commercially?
Yes. Assets you generate with Creators Toolbox tools are yours to use in personal and commercial projects.
How is Creators Toolbox different from Canva or Figma?
Creators Toolbox is a focused collection of single-purpose generators and utilities — not a full design editor. It complements tools like Canva and Figma by producing textures, patterns, gradients, and effects you can import into your main workflow.
